do_so_do_it_do_that.name: do so do it do that

saved_test.name: Ellipsis, Substitution and Reference: V3 All Levels
saved_test.description: Page-local V3 package for Ellipsis, Substitution and Reference with A1-C2 coverage.

questions.question: Choose the sentence that correctly expresses ellipsis: {a1}

a1.answer: I can help tomorrow if you can
options: I can help tomorrow if you can
I can help tomorrow if you can help tomorrow
I can help tomorrow if you do
I can help tomorrow if you are

a1.answer: She has read the report but I have not
options: She has read the report but I have not

She has read the report but I did not
She has read the report but I am not

They reviewed the plan and did it carefully
They reviewed the plan and did that careful

I think that is true
I think it
I think yes it
